# REQ-SYS-047: Sensor shall ignore false positives from condensation

## ASIL Level
A

## Description
Sensor shall ignore false positives from condensation.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-5.4.2 — safety goal SG-SE-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: None
- Down: TC-008-SW (software_test)
